name: Geekatplay Studio HyperTile FLUX Refiner Profile
author: Geekatplay Studio
description: Optional third-stage FLUX refinement profile for the Geekatplay Studio tiled upscale pipeline.

notes: Keep the input to this stage already upscaled and composition-locked.
Use FLUX only for the final coherence pass, not for the first 4x jump.
On 12-16 GB cards keep tiles at 512 and batch size at 1.
Use FLUX schnell when you want a faster validation pass before running FLUX dev.
